name: I Wanna Quit My Job
short_description: Help Sam quit his job by experiencing his childhood night terror. Within a maze of underground corridors, a contorted masked creature lurks. Collect it's relics to escape the chest tightening nightmare.
detailed_description:
"I Wanna Quit My Job" is a first person horror game with a simple goal, collect the floating bloody relics and make it to the end of the holy tunnel situated somewhere within the maze. Average playtime of 30-60 minutes to complete. 

Gameplay

The game is a first person survival experience. You're not much more than a rat in a maze. Except there's something in the maze with you. Black demonic smoke looms around the map cutting the player off and creating dead ends. However this creature has access through such things. You will run endlessly through repetitive corridors in search of an escape. We suggest you move quick and try your best to remember where you've already been.
